query: SELECT fp.id, fp.name, fp.moduleId, fp.isActive, fp.allowPointsRedemption, fp.allowPurchase, m.name as moduleName FROM feature_plans fp LEFT JOIN modules m ON fp.moduleId = m.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT fp.id, fp.name, fp.moduleId, fp.isActive, fp.allowPointsRedemption, fp.allowPurchase, m.name as moduleName FROM feature_plans fp LEFT JOIN modules m ON fp.moduleId = m.id;
